revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Moved discussion from]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Moved discussion from]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: /* top */ add nud to supress link formatting
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{pp-protected|reason=per request|small=yes}}</noinclude>{{ hmbox
| class   = unresolved
| image   = Purple arrow down.svg
| message = Moved {{#if:{{{back|}}}|back }}from {{#ifexist:{{{1}}}|{{format linkr|{{{1}}}|nud={{{nud}}}}}|<nowiki />{{{1}}}}}
| extra   = {{{sig|{{{signature|{{{reason|{{{result|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}} {{#if:{{{3|}}}|<!-- Fake signature to fix archiving: [[user:example]] ([[user talk:example|talk]]) {{{3|}}} -->}}
}}<noinclude>{{documentation}}<!-- place category and language links on the /doc sub-page, not here --></noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515111839|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{pp-protected|reason=per request|small=yes}}</noinclude>{{ hmbox | class = unresolved | image = Purple arrow down.svg | message = Moved {{#if:{{{back|}}}|back }}from {{#ifexist:{{{1}}}|{{format linkr|{{{1}}}|nud={{{nud}}}}}|<nowiki />{{{1}}}}} | extra = {{{sig|{{{signature|{{{reason|{{{result|{{{2|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}} {{#if:{{{3|}}}|<!-- Fake signature to fix archiving: [[user:example]] ([[user talk:example|talk]]) {{{3|}}} -->}} }}<noinclude>{{documentation}}<!-- place category and language links on the /doc sub-page, not here --></noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTMoved discussion from]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESToved discussion from]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESToved discussion from]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

</noinclude>
